_provenance: Mined on 2026-06-10 by read-only recon agents (gh api branch-protection + workflow YAML reads) over coproduct-opensource/nucleus and coproduct-private/spiffy; checked in verbatim as spike ground truth.

workflows.name: Econ Lean Proofs + Golden Seal
jobs: econ-lean (lake build Nucleus (econ proofs + golden seal))

repos.notes: REQUIRED-CHECK SOURCE: gh api repos/coproduct-opensource/nucleus/branches/main/protection/required_status_checks returned HTTP 200 with strict:true and exactly the 12 contexts listed (all app_id 15368 = GitHub Actions). gh api repos/coproduct-opensource/nucleus/rules/branches/main returned [] (no rulesets). Mapping: Rustfmt/Clippy/Tests/Fuzz/OWASP LLM Security Gauntlet = ci.yml jobs; Code Coverage (llvm-cov) + Mutation Testing = coverage-matrix.yml jobs llvm-cov/mutants; audit = audit.yml job key; deny (X) = deny.yml matrix (deny.yml:24-29). Branch protection extras: enforce_admins ENABLED=false, required_signatures false, required_linear_history false, NO required_pull_request_reviews key (0 required reviews). MERGE QUEUE: NOT enabled — rulesets are empty and the branch-protection JSON has no merge-queue rule; yet 17 workflows declare a merge_group: trigger (e.g. ci.yml:7, deny.yml:12, econ-lean.yml:23, lean-build.yml:13, coverage-matrix.yml:7) — these triggers are dead code today. allow_auto_merge:true, delete_branch_on_merge:true (repo API). UNENFORCED GATES (run on pull_request but NOT in the required set): codeql.yml (CodeQL), lean-build.yml (Lean 4 Kernel Proof), econ-lean.yml, rubric-lean.yml, ck-policy-lean.yml, ck-policy-aeneas.yml, aeneas.yml, aeneas-ifc-scoped.yml, aeneas-oidc-spiffe.yml, kani-nightly.yml (Kani BMC — PR-triggered, not required), oidc-gates.yml (vendor-neutrality + algorithm-pin), dep-hygiene.yml, manifest-guards.yml, line-ratchet.yml, contracts.yml, scan.yml, trust-registry.yml, wasm-pure-crates.yml, plus coverage-matrix.yml's proof-ratchet job ('Proof Count Ratchet' is not a required context even though its sibling jobs are). I.e. every Lean/Kani/Aeneas formal-proof gate is advisory; only fmt/clippy/test/fuzz/OWASP/coverage/mutants/audit/deny are enforced.

workflows.name: E2E Claude-launch job
jobs: e2e-claude-job (post job → run → retrieve bundle → verify via SDK)

workflows.name: publish-mcp
jobs: publish (publish-mcp.yml:36; extracted via grep — see notes on YAML parse)

repos.notes: REQUIRED-CHECK SOURCE: gh api repos/coproduct-private/spiffy/branches/main/protection/required_status_checks → HTTP 403 'Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public to enable this feature'; gh api repos/coproduct-private/spiffy/rules/branches/main → same 403; gh api repos/coproduct-private/spiffy/rulesets → same 403. This is not 'unknown' — branch protection AND rulesets are unavailable on this private free-plan repo, so ZERO checks are enforced on main; required_checks=[] is the ground truth, and ALL 22 workflows are unenforced gates (the PR-gating ones — Clippy, Coverage gate, devendor-gate, Econ kernel parity gate, Differential fuzz, Kani welfare-overflow, Lean formal proofs, Pigouvian invariants, STRIDE, Supply chain, verify-gate, Wasm, Reproducible build, cardano, aeneas-econ-freshness, e2e-claude, zk-clearing-spike — are advisory only). allow_auto_merge:false, delete_branch_on_merge:false (repo API). MERGE QUEUE: impossible (needs rulesets/protection, 403) yet 3 workflows declare merge_group: triggers — cardano.yml:25, econ-kernel-parity-gate.yml:24, lean.yml — dead triggers. Operator-gated publishers: publish-mcp.yml is workflow_dispatch-only with dry_run default true (publish-mcp.yml:2-8); release-nucleus-verify.yml and release-issue-license.yml are dispatch-driven. CAVEAT: publish-mcp.yml fails strict YAML 1.1/1.2 parsing (PyYAML ScannerError at line 56: unquoted colon in step name 'Build @nucleus/verify (file: dependency)'); job list for that file was extracted by grep (single job 'publish' at publish-mcp.yml:36) — the known unquoted-colon footgun, worth verifying GitHub still accepts the file.
